hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in */activity.jsonl) exit 0;; esac; a='H總編'; case "$f" in *worldbuilding*|*world*|*characters*|*settings*) a='H世觀';; *chapters*|*ch[0-9]*) a='H作家';; *reviews*|*review*) a='H讀者';; *outline*) a='H總編';; esac; echo "{\"timestamp\":\"$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+08:00)\",\"agent\":\"$a\",\"type\":\"task\",\"content\":\"檔案更新: $(basename "$f")\"}" >> "$PWD/logs/activity.jsonl"; } 2>/dev/null || true
